cases.title: Organizer uploads cover image via POST /events/{eventId}/cover-image
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
Draft or editable event owned by organizer scope
Valid OrganizerAdmin or OrganizerStaff JWT
Valid JPEG, PNG, or WebP image file under 5 MB
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as multipart/form-data with image file and organizer bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with any authenticated or public read token per endpoint policy
cases.expected: Upload returns HTTP 200 or 201; event row persists cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at; GET event detail response includes non-null coverImageUrl pointing to controlled media path

cases.title: Participant event list includes coverImageUrl for events with cover
preconditions: Published event with cover_image_key set via organizer upload
Participant JWT or public list access per GET /events policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 as participant
Locate the seeded event in items array
cases.expected: Paginated list item for the event includes coverImageUrl when cover_image_key is set; URL is fetchable and matches uploaded asset

cases.title: Participant event detail returns coverImageUrl and media endpoint serves image
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover image and known cover_image_key
Participant authenticated or public detail access per API policy
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and read coverImageUrl from response
GET the coverImageUrl (or GET /api/v1/media/events/{key} derived from key)
cases.expected: Event detail includes coverImageUrl; media GET returns HTTP 200 with correct Content-Type (image/jpeg, image/png, or image/webp) and image bytes matching upload

cases.title: Organizer uploads cover in event form; participant sees thumbnail on list and hero on detail
preconditions: Web app running with organizer event create/edit form and participant discovery pages
Organizer logged in; participant session available or public browse enabled
Valid image file for file picker
steps: As organizer, open create or edit event form, select cover image via file picker, observe preview, and save/upload
As participant, navigate to event discovery list (paginated card grid)
Open the same event detail page
cases.expected: Organizer form shows upload progress and preview per FR-35; participant event card renders 16:9 cover thumbnail via next/image; event detail header renders cover hero; uploaded image visible on both surfaces per AC-17

cases.title: Organizer replaces existing cover image with new upload
preconditions: Event already has cover_image_key from prior upload
Organizer JWT with write scope on event
Second valid image file (different content) under 5 MB
steps: Record current coverImageUrl and cover_image_key from GET /events/{eventId}
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with replacement file
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} and fetch new coverImageUrl
cases.expected: cover_image_key and cover_image_updated_at update; coverImageUrl changes; new media endpoint serves replacement bytes; prior key superseded or removed per storage policy

cases.title: Organizer removes cover via DELETE /events/{eventId}/cover-image
preconditions: Event with existing cover_image_key
Organizer JWT with write scope
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with organizer bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12 and locate event item
cases.expected: DELETE succeeds; cover_image_key cleared in database; GET detail and list responses omit coverImageUrl or return null; UI falls back to neutral placeholder per event-specific components spec

cases.title: Cover upload validator accepts only image/jpeg, image/png, and image/webp
preconditions: Upload MIME and extension validator module available in isolation
steps: Validate sample buffers or declared MIME types for image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp
Validate disallowed types such as image/gif, application/pdf, text/plain
cases.expected: Allowed types pass validation; disallowed types fail before domain execution per NFR-18 and API design §2.7

cases.title: Cover upload rejects files exceeding 5 MB maximum size
preconditions: Organizer JWT and editable event
Valid MIME image file larger than 5 MB (or boundary test fixture)
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with oversized file as multipart upload
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with stable invalid-input error code; no cover_image_key persisted; event detail coverImageUrl unchanged if prior cover absent

cases.title: Cover images served only from controlled GET /media/events/{key} storage path
preconditions: Event with uploaded cover and known storage key under UPLOADS_DIR
No direct filesystem URL exposure
steps: Upload cover and capture cover_image_key
GET /api/v1/media/events/{key} with valid key
Attempt to access raw filesystem path or traversal variants (e.g. ../) via media route
cases.expected: Valid key returns image from controlled handler; path traversal or arbitrary file access rejected; storage confined to configured uploads directory per NFR-18

cases.title: Cover upload and delete require authenticated organizer authorization
preconditions: Editable event in organizer scope
Valid organizer JWT and separate participant JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with organizer token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with participant token only
DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with participant token only
cases.expected: Organizer-scoped requests succeed; participant-only mutating requests return 403 unauthorized; sensitive media mutation gated per NFR-07 and NFR-08

cases.title: Unauthenticated cover upload returns 401
preconditions: Existing event eligible for cover upload
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; no cover_image_key written; consistent typed error envelope with requestId

cases.title: Invalid MIME type upload rejected before persistence
preconditions: Organizer JWT
Non-image file (e.g. application/pdf or text/plain) presented as upload
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image with disallowed file type
cases.expected: HTTP 400 invalid input; cover_image_key remains null or unchanged; no file stored under uploads path

cases.title: Event without cover shows neutral placeholder on list and detail
preconditions: Published event with cover_image_key null
Participant browsing discovery and detail pages
steps: Navigate to participant event discovery list
Open event detail for event without cover
cases.expected: Event card and detail header render neutral placeholder illustration instead of broken image; no coverImageUrl-dependent fetch errors; next/image fallback behavior per UI spec

cases.title: Cover upload for event outside organizer scope returns 403 or 404
preconditions: Event owned by organizing unit A
Organizer JWT scoped only to unit B
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image as organizer B with valid image file
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per roles-permissions scope rules; no cover_image_key change on target event

cases.title: DELETE cover-image on event without cover is idempotent or returns clear not-found
preconditions: Event with cover_image_key null
Organizer JWT with write scope
steps: DELETE /api/v1/events/{eventId}/cover-image
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}
cases.expected: DELETE returns success or stable 404 without error side effects; event remains without coverImageUrl; no orphan storage writes

cases.title: Cover upload at exactly 5 MB boundary accepted; just over 5 MB rejected
preconditions: Organizer JWT and editable event without cover
Fixtures: valid WebP at 5_000_000 bytes and at 5_000_001 bytes
steps: POST cover-image with 5 MB file
DELETE cover-image to reset
POST cover-image with 5 MB + 1 byte file
cases.expected: At-limit file uploads successfully; over-limit file returns 400; boundary enforced consistently per API max 5 MB contract
